name: AS 1684 — Residential Timber-Framed Construction (Parts 1-4)
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that enforce AS 1684 across all four parts: Part 1 (Design Criteria), Part 2 (Non-Cyclonic Span Tables), Part 3 (Cyclonic Areas), Part 4 (Simplified — Non-Cyclonic Span Tables). Selects wind classification, member sizing, bracing, tie-down, stud spacing, roof pitch, timber stress grade and bushfire attack level.

part_1.title: Design Criteria
part_1.scope: Procedures and design criteria for timber-framing

part_2.title: Non-Cyclonic Areas — Span Tables
part_2.scope: Span tables for wind regions N1-N4

part_3.title: Cyclonic Areas
part_3.scope: Span tables and design for wind regions C1-C3 (Qld/NT/WA cyclonic)

part_4.title: Simplified — Non-Cyclonic Span Tables
part_4.scope: Simplified span tables for typical dwellings in N1-N3
